title: Tenderly Aerated Vietnamese Mature Cheddar Banh Cuon
description: A nostalgic Vietnamese dish featuring mature cheddar, wrapped in a delicate rice flour banh cuon, served in an earthenware bowl. This herbal and aerated dish is a low-fat friendly twist on traditional banh cuon.

ingredients.name: herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped, such as mint or basil

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated mature cheddar cheese and chopped herbs.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the rice flour, water, and salt to form a smooth batter.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and brush with sesame oil.
Pour a small amount of the rice flour batter into the pan and tilt to evenly coat the bottom.
Once the batter is set, place a portion of the cheese and herb mixture in the center of the banh cuon.
Roll up the banh cuon and place it in an earthenware bowl.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
Serve the banh cuon hot, garnished with chopped scallions and a sprinkle of black pepper.
